topic: spine claim confirmed — standard is label-only
decision_taken: the `standard` QuantityType subclass is empty and FarmQuantityType/QuantityTypeBase::buildFieldDefinitions() returns [] — measure/value/units/label are all BASE fields of the core quantity entity, already folded by the shared store's QuantityInput/QuantityRecord. Ported as a thin naming surface (quantityType:'standard'); no new event kind, computed field, constraint, or workflow. Big-punt valve NOT triggered.
reversal_condition: a source reading showing the standard bundle overriding buildFieldDefinitions or a config carrying a field/constraint beyond the base quantity spine

topic: confirmed-only status gate inherited from the shared store
decision_taken: yield_total/log_count over standard quantities inherit the shared store's confirmed-only STATUS_CONTRACT gate (the ONE chosen pending-status-gates divergence); the port adds NO numeric fold of its own, so the divergence stays implemented once in the shared store, not re-decided per bundle
reversal_condition: Duke re-binds pending-status-gates toward source fidelity for the log/quantity family

topic: no oracle contact / no recorded divergence fixtures this run
decision_taken: spine-tier smoke build with no oracle contact — port.manifest.json declares divergences:[] rather than fabricating fixture_ids; the confirmed-only gate is documented in prose and punts. Trailing readings judge against recorded packs and will materialize the real divergence rows.
reversal_condition: a trailing reading run records fixture-level divergences for this port
